name: A J & S Limousine Svc
recent_news: No web presence or news found; appears to be a micro-operator with ~4 employees and ~$238K revenue.
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in: micro single-vehicle livery/limo operator in suburban Chicago with no evidence of school-bus or SPED route contracts. Flagged 'special_needs=1' likely reflects ADA/wheelchair livery, not yellow-bus K-12 routes.

name: M & M Taxi LLC
recent_news: Operates wheelchair-accessible NEMT and taxi service in Ouachita Parish; no school-district contracts disclosed.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target. Company is a non-emergency medical/wheelchair taxi (dialysis, doctor visits) in West Monroe LA, not a K-12 school-bus or SPED student-transport contractor. Out of scope for a yellow-bus platform roll-up.

name: Atlantic Express Limousine LLC
recent_news: Unrelated to the defunct Atlantic Express school-bus company (Chapter 11 in 2013); this is a separate micro limousine LLC at a residential Bergenfield address. No web/news footprint found.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target. Name collision with the bankrupt Atlantic Express school-bus operator is coincidental; this entity is a 3-person livery LLC at a residential address with no evidence of K-12 or SPED contracts.
